name: marathon-cents
prompt: Customers report that invoice totals from our orders service are occasionally off by one cent — support reproduced it with a $19.99 line item. The service lives at {DIR} (entry points in src/api/, tests in src/test_orders.py, which passes). Find the root cause and fix it. Work only inside that directory. When finished, your final message is your report.

grade.check_cmd: cd {DIR}/src && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from core.models import LineItem, Order; from services.invoicing import invoice_total_cents; o=Order(order_id='x'); o.items=[LineItem('K',19.99,1)]; t=invoice_total_cents(o); assert t==2099, t; print('ok')" && python3 test_orders.py
